reviews.review_msg: professor is unfair and violates the university code of ethics and fairness

Professor is unfair, pretty sure it violates SFU ethical regulations. Professor took attendance at the start of class. Then, he cancelled it and retook attendance when everyone was on break. He then selectively told people about the new one.When confronted, he threatened that future ones would only have 30 seconds to complete.

Attendance is taken unfairly. Professor decided he was unhappy with the class, so he cancelled the first attendance and secretly opened a second one when everyone was on break. When confronted, he threatened that future attendances would have a 30 second window to complete.
